questionHtml: The diagram illustrates the crystal structure of aluminium metal with the unit cell indicated. Outline the significance of the unit cell.
markschemeHtml:
the smallest repeating unit «from which the crystal structure can be derived»

 

Accept “building block that the structure is made from”.

[1 mark]
